Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Magic_ZhenShuiJieJie
Text.Desc: Greatly increase your Qi and Natural Resilience recovery speed while within the Qi Aquasphere.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Magic_BeiDouJianJie
Text.Desc: Greatly increase your Artifact Power while within the Grand Chariot Bladezone.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Magic_ZhenHuoJieJie
Text.Desc: Greatly increase your Spell Power while within the Qi Ignosphere.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Season_DanQi
Text.Desc: Surrounded by a rich Alchemy Qi.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Elixir_Wu
Text.Desc: Surrounded by a rich Alchemy Qi, cultivation level decreases, learning speed increases.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Elixir_Jin
Text.Desc: Surrounded by a rich Alchemy Qi.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Elixir_Mu
Text.Desc: Surrounded by a rich Alchemy Qi.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Elixir_Shui
Text.Desc: Surrounded by a rich Alchemy Qi.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Elixir_Huo
Text.Desc: Surrounded by a rich Alchemy Qi.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Elixir_Tu
Text.Desc: Surrounded by a rich Alchemy Qi.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Elixir_JinMu
Text.Desc: Surrounded by a rich Alchemy Qi, woodcutting and harvesting speed increase.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Elixir_JinShui
Text.Desc: Surrounded by a rich Alchemy Qi, handicraft and sewing speed increase.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Elixir_JinHuo
Text.Desc: Surrounded by a rich Alchemy Qi, mining speed increases.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Elixir_JinTu
Text.Desc: Surrounded by a rich Alchemy Qi, mining yield increases.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Elixir_MuShui
Text.Desc: Surrounded by a rich Alchemy Qi, harvest yield increases.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Elixir_MuHuo
Text.Desc: Surrounded by a rich Alchemy Qi, forging and cooking speed increase.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Elixir_MuTu
Text.Desc: Surrounded by a rich Alchemy Qi, construction speed increases.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Elixir_ShuiHuo
Text.Desc: Surrounded by a rich Alchemy Qi, disaster relief speed and success rate increase.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Elixir_ShuiTu
Text.Desc: Surrounded by a rich Alchemy Qi, expected healing effects and natural recovery increase.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Elixir_HuoTu
Text.Desc: Surrounded by a rich Alchemy Qi, demolition and stone processing speed increase.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Elixir_JinMuShui
Text.Desc: Surrounded by a rich Alchemy Qi, wood attribute technique compatibility increases.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Elixir_JinMuHuo
Text.Desc: Surrounded by a rich Alchemy Qi, alchemy yield increases.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Elixir_JinMuTu
Text.Desc: Surrounded by a rich Alchemy Qi, foundation building speed, cultivation speed, and mental state value increase.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Elixir_JinShuiHuo
Text.Desc: Surrounded by a rich Alchemy Qi, artifact refinement success rate increases.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Elixir_JinShuiTu
Text.Desc: Surrounded by a rich Alchemy Qi, water attribute technique compatibility increases.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Elixir_JinHuoTu
Text.Desc: Surrounded by a rich Alchemy Qi, metal attribute technique compatibility increases.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Elixir_MuShuiHuo
Text.Desc: Surrounded by a rich Alchemy Qi, fire attribute technique compatibility increases.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Elixir_MuShuiTu
Text.Desc: Surrounded by a rich Alchemy Qi, pill refining speed increases.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Elixir_MuHuoTu
Text.Desc: Surrounded by a rich Alchemy Qi, earth attribute technique compatibility increases.

Text.Name: Modifier_Weather_Elixir_ShuiHuoTu
Text.Desc: Surrounded by a rich Alchemy Qi, magical treasure refinement speed increases.

Text.Desc: Surrounded by a rich Alchemy Qi.
